## Delivery Specificity Gate

- Each page maps back to one or more functional-spec units:
- Each page maps back to ui-schema blocks or DSL entities:
- Required states include normal / empty / exception / permission-difference when applicable:
- Every action has named triggers and expected results in functional spec:
- Delivery does not depend on image2 as the final UI truth source:
